marshallese.arithmetic_strategy_challenge: Apañ in Wāween ko an Arithmetic
marshallese.correct_the_exact_answer_and_estimate_: Ejiṃwe. Uwaak eo ejiṃwe im estimate eo rej ekkar ippān doon.
marshallese.your_exact_answer_is_correct_revise_th: Uwaak eo aṃ ejiṃwe. Ukōt estimate eo bwe en epaak ḷọk im maroñ jerbal ñan etale.
marshallese.not_yet_compare_your_answer_with_your_: Ejjañin. Keidi uwaak eo aṃ ippān estimate eo aṃ innem kajjioñ juon wāween.
marshallese.that_is_not_the_key_error_read_the_wor: Eñin ejjab bōd eo eḷaptata. Riit jerbal eo juon place value juon.
marshallese.correct_the_operation_and_context_answ: Ejiṃwe. Operation eo im uwaak eo ekkar ñan wāween eo, aolep rej ekkar ñan bwebwenato eo.
marshallese.reconsider_which_operation_represents_: Bar ḷōmṇak kōn operation ta eo ej kwaḷọk kōtaan ko ilo bwebwenato eo.
marshallese.the_operation_fits_recheck_how_the_con: Operation eo ekkar. Bar etale ekōjkan wāween eo ej ukōt uwaak in nōṃba eo.
marshallese.opening_a_missed_story_for_another_try: Ej kōpeḷḷọk juon bwebwenato eo ear bōd ñan bar kajjioñ.
marshallese.place_value_table_and_text_alternative: Tebōḷ in place value im jeje ko jet
marshallese.place_value_alignment_for: Karōk ekkar ñan place value ñan
marshallese.has_no_dots_because_one_factor_is_zero: ejjeḷọk tibbat ie kōnke juon factor ej zero; product eo ej zero.
marshallese.one_factor_is_0_so_there_are_no_equal_: Juon factor ej 0, kōn men in ejjeḷọk kumi ko rejoñan wōt ñan jeje. Product: 0.
marshallese.area_model_showing_partial_products_fo: Model in area eo ej kwaḷọk partial products ñan
marshallese.objects_divided_into_groups_of: men ko emōj ajeji ilo kumi ko ewōr
marshallese.equal_groups_model: Model in kumi ko rejoñan wōt
marshallese.this_whole_number_workspace_keeps_the_: Jikin jerbal in whole number in ej kōjparok bwe nōṃba kein karuo en jab ḷap jān kein kajuon. Ñe mejānkajjik in katak ej uwaak ko rettā jān zero, kōjerbal integer number line.
marshallese.read_strategy_aloud: Riit wāween eo ilo ainikien eḷap
marshallese.reasonableness_check_use_friendly_oper: Etale eḷaññe ejiṃwe: kōjerbal nōṃba ko repidodo ñan bwini
marshallese.estimation_is_a_safety_check_not_a_rep: Estimate ej juon etale in kōjparok, ejjab pinej jenkwan ḷōmṇak eo ejiṃwe.
marshallese.correct_your_exact_answer_and_estimate: Ejiṃwe. Uwaak eo aṃ ejiṃwe im estimate eo aṃ rej jipañ doon.
marshallese.your_exact_answer_is_right_revise_the_: Uwaak eo aṃ ejiṃwe. Ukōt estimate eo bwe en deḷọñ ilo joñan eo ekkar iturin
marshallese.not_yet_recheck_each_place_and_compare: Ejjañin. Bar etale kajjojo place value im keidi ippān estimate eo aṃ.
marshallese.diagnose_the_reasoning_not_the_learner: Kile ḷōmṇak eo, ejjab ri-katak eo. Bōd ko rej kaṃool ta model eo enaaj jipañ tokālik.
marshallese.choose_the_most_important_error: Kāālōt bōd eo eḷaptata an aorōk
marshallese.look_again_at_what_happened_to_each_pl: Bar lale ta eo ear waḷọk ñan kajjojo place value ak kajjojo partial product.
marshallese.that_operation_does_not_represent_the_: Operation eṇ ejjañin kwaḷọk kōtaan eo. Kajjitōk ippaṃ make eḷaññe bwebwenato eo ej kobaik, ajej, bar kōṃṃan kumi ko rejoñan wōt, ak pukot jete kumi renaaj deḷọñ.
marshallese.the_whole_number_answer_is_right_re_re: Uwaak in whole number ejiṃwe. Bar riit ta eo bwebwenato eo ej kajjitōk bwe kwōn kōṃṃane kōn joñan eo ej pād wōt.
marshallese.the_operation_fits_recheck_the_calcula: Operation eo ekkar. Bar etale bwini eo im pepe eḷaññe wāween eo ej kōjerbal quotient, men eo ej pād wōt, ak juon bar kumi.
marshallese.choose_the_operation_from_the_story_th: Kāālōt operation eo jān bwebwenato eo, innem kōmeḷeḷeik uwaak eo ekkar ñan wāween eo.
marshallese.choose_an_operation_for_this_story: Kāālōt juon operation ñan bwebwenato in
marshallese.n_3_relationship_are_quantities_joined_s: 3. Kōtaan: joñan ko rej kobaḷọk ke, rej ajej ke, rej bar kōṃṃan ilo kumi ko rejoñan wōt ke, ak rej kumi ekkar ñan ḷap?
marshallese.n_5_context_check_decide_what_the_story_: 5. Etale wāween: pepe ta meḷeḷein ñan bwebwenato eo ñe ewōr joñan ej pād wōt.
marshallese.models_the_story_and_the_answer_is: ej kwaḷọk bwebwenato eo, im uwaak eo ej
marshallese.back_to_stem_tools: Rọọl ñan Kein Jerbal ko an STEM
marshallese.concrete_visual_symbolic: Men ko jeṃaroñ jibwe → Men ko jej loi → Kakōḷḷe
marshallese.arithmetic_strategy_studio: 🧮 Studio in Wāween ko an Arithmetic
marshallese.build_meaning_first_compare_strategies: Kalōk meḷeḷe ṃokta, keidi wāween ko, im kōjerbal estimate ñan etale kajjojo uwaak.
marshallese.arithmetic_studio_sections: Ṃōttan ko an Studio in Arithmetic
marshallese.a_correct_answer_matters_but_a_model_e: Uwaak eo ejiṃwe eaorōk, ak model, kōmeḷeḷe, estimate, im etale kōn inverse operation rej kōṃṃan bwe ḷōmṇak en pād etto.
